name: stage2-rvv-production-selected-dispatch-admission
title: Stage2 RVV production-kernel selected-dispatch performance-admission campaign
description: Macro campaign for Stage2 RVV production-kernel selected-dispatch performance admission. Gate 1 current slice hardens the production policy/target selected-dispatch mirror handoff so provider mirrors must tie back to structured tcrv.exec.dispatch case/fallback facts before selected-dispatch policy or target artifact acceptance.
creator: codex
notes: Gate 1 current slice complete: RVVLowPrecisionPerformancePolicy now verifies selected-dispatch case/fallback mirrors against structured dispatch boundary fields, and target artifact validation rejects stale provider selected-dispatch mirrors even when candidate metadata matches them. Gates 2-4 remain open. No ssh rvv evidence was required because this slice changes validation/diagnostics only, not generated runtime, correctness, or performance behavior.
